commit.message:
fix: match server-mediated file transfers by username, not relay token

The connect_to_peer FILE_TRANSFER message uses a relay token that
differs from the transfer token set during TRANSFER_REQUEST. This
caused all server-mediated downloads to fail with "no matching transfer".

Fix: Fall back to matching by username (find_active_transfer_for_user)
when token-based matching fails. Prefer CONNECTED state transfers.

Also: Inline the file transfer I/O in handle_outbound_file_transfer
instead of delegating to handle_file_transfer_connection (which would
also fail to match the relay token).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add per-game tournament projections with chronological ordering (#80)

* Add tournament games: normalized game model, score recording, and game generation

Backend:
- Add core.tournament_games table with bracket_position, round, region tracking
- Add tournament format column to tournaments table
- Add TournamentGame model and SQLC queries (CRUD, list by tournament/round)
- Add TournamentGameRepository with full adapter implementation
- Add game generator that creates tournament games from bracket structure
- Extend bracket service with dual-write (select winner writes to both bracket
  and tournament_games), score recording, and game generation endpoints
- Add HTTP handlers: list games, get game, record score, generate games
- Add tournament game DTO with response mapping
- Add integration tests for repository and unit tests for generator/service/DTOs

Frontend:
- Add tournament games query keys (games, gameDetail)
- Add tournamentGame schema with Zod validation
- Add bracket service methods for game listing and score recording
- Enhance BracketGameCard and CompactGameCard with score display
- Add games section to TournamentViewPage
- Update useBracket hook with game-aware queries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix generate-recaps build: pass gameRepo to bracket.New after signature change

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Extract TournamentGameRepository, auto-derive winner from scores, and display game status

- Extract TournamentGameRepository from TournamentRepository so game
  CRUD has its own dedicated struct and wiring
- Auto-derive winner in RecordScore when no winner is set, triggering
  the full SelectWinner flow (wins, elimination, propagation)
- Use COALESCE in UpdateTournamentGameResult to preserve existing scores
  when NULL is passed (fixes score wipe on dual-write)
- Add game status field to BracketGame model, DTO, and frontend schema
- Display "Final" and "Live" status badges in bracket UI cards
- Enqueue prediction refresh in recordScoreHandler when winner is derived

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add backfill-games CLI tool to materialize historical tournament games

Adds a CLI tool that reconstructs tournament_games rows for historical
tournaments (2016-2025) by reusing the bracket builder and result
application logic. Scores are placeholder (1-0) since historical scores
were never captured. Also fixes tournamentGameToCreateParams to pass
through scores instead of hardcoding nil.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Use tournament games as source of truth for bracket rendering

Replace the dual applyCurrentResults + score overlay with a single
applyTournamentGames pure function that reads winners, scores, status,
and team assignments directly from tournament game records. Falls back
to the old win/bye-counter approach when no games exist.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add ESPN score import service, school aliases, and score-authoritative winner derivation

Introduces a score import pipeline that fetches real game scores and times
from ESPN's scoreboard API and records them against tournament games. Key
changes:

- ESPN adapter: HTTP client, response parsing, school name alias mapping
- Score import service: matches ESPN games to tournament games by team pairs,
  records scores chronologically, rebuilds game index after each recording
  to handle winner corrections that propagate to later-round slots
- RecordScore now derives winners from scores and corrects mismatches
  instead of rejecting them, making the import authoritative over
  hand-entered data
- Score import worker for polling during live tournaments
- Backfill-games safety: refuse to regenerate if games have recorded results

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Remove obsolete test for inconsistent winner/score rejection

RecordScore now auto-derives the winner from scores rather than
rejecting inconsistent combinations, making this test invalid.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add per-game prediction system for real-time tournament updates

Instead of regenerating predictions only when an entire round completes,
the simulator now locks in decided games immediately. After each game goes
final, predictions regenerate with that outcome locked in and remaining
games simulated — enabling real-time prediction updates during the tournament.

Key changes:
- New decided_game_count column on prediction_batches (migration)
- Game-aware matchup generator that deterministically resolves decided games
- BuildDecidedByTeamPair / ComputeThroughRoundFromGames helpers
- RunGameAware service method used by the core compute worker
- Standings dedup switched from through_round to decided_game_count

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add bracket game scores and improved tournament view UI

Includes score display on bracket games, updated frontend bracket
rendering, and DTO changes to support slot scores.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix TypeScript build errors in bracket test helpers

Add required `status` default to makeGame helpers — Zod's
`.optional().default()` produces a non-optional output type, so
manually constructed BracketGame objects need the field set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add completed_at to tournament games for prediction timeline

Records when a game result was finalized. Set automatically by
UpdateGameResult when status transitions to 'final' (uses NOW() on
first write, preserves existing value on re-record). Cleared on
ClearGameResult. Enables using real timestamps on the prediction
bump chart x-axis instead of just decided_game_count.

For historical games, completed_at can be backfilled by estimating
from scheduled_at + average game duration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add per-game forecast bump chart for play-by-play standings

Replace the round-level bump chart (7 ticks) with a per-game chart
(up to 67 ticks) so participants see every rise and fall as each game
completes. The chart uses horizontal scrolling at ~40px per game and
clusters x-axis labels by game day (e.g. "Round of 64 (1)").

Backend computes gameStandings alongside existing roundStandings,
incrementally tracking wins per team across completed games sorted
by CompletedAt. Frontend switches from ResponsiveBump to fixed-width
Bump in a scrollable container with day-boundary axis labels.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Make gameStandings optional with empty default for backward compatibility

Prevents Zod parse failure if backend response doesn't include the
field (e.g. cached responses or rolling deploys).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix per-game favorites using stale snapshot instead of actual team state

ComputeGameProjections was snapshotting teams at cp.ThroughRound, which
reset eliminated teams to alive at throughRound=0. The handler now tracks
per-game eliminations and passes accurate team state to each projection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Refactor predictions to per-game checkpoints with day-based bump chart

Replace round-based prediction architecture with per-game checkpoints.
Bump chart now shows day-boundary columns instead of round columns, and
admin predictions page picks the correct round-boundary batch (lowest
decidedGameCount per throughRound) instead of the last one.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Replace bump chart with arrow table for forecast tab

Swaps the heavy @nivo/bump chart for a simple leaderboard-style list
with rank delta arrows showing movement since the previous game.
Removes buildBumpChartData, ForecastPointTooltip, and associated tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix projection dropdown chronological sort and backfill game timestamps

Sort game checkpoints by ScheduledAt (actual game time) instead of
bracket position so the projections dropdown reflects real play order.
Fix ESPN date parsing (no-seconds format fallback) and backfill both
ScheduledAt and CompletedAt for all imported games. Rename forecast
tab to projections.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix favorites projection using wrong scoring rules for multi-pool tournaments

Prediction batches computed FavoritesTotalPoints using tournament-level
scoring rules (oldest pool fallback), but the dashboard displayed this
pre-baked value for every pool — even pools with custom scoring rules.

Added FavoritesMaxProgress (scoring-rule-independent) to predicted team
values, and recompute favorites at display time using pool-specific rules
via PointsForProgress(poolRules, maxProgress, 0).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
fix: 修正速度归一化错误，第一障碍物提前出现，等待时间从~11s缩短到~5s（#56）

之前换算漏乘60fps，导致速度约为正确值的1/360：
- speedBase: 0.000167 → 0.0006/ms（原版SPEED=6×60fps÷600px）
- speedMax:  0.000334 → 0.0012/ms（原版MAX_SPEED=12）
- speedAccel: 速度公式改为线性 speedBase + speedAccel×t（原版每帧+=ACCELERATION）
- 加速100s到最高速：speedAccel = (0.0012-0.0006)/100000ms = 0.000006/ms
- 第一障碍物生成位置：1.5 → 1.2（约2s到达，接近原版CLEAR_TIME=3s节奏）
- 等待时间：热身3s + 障碍物飞行~2s ≈ 5s（原版约4.5s）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
test(engine): strengthen Clone isolation tests with bidirectional field assertions

Add assertions on the cloned struct's mutated field values in 6 Clone
isolation tests to verify that mutations on the clone actually took
effect (not just that the original was unaffected). This catches
potential Clone implementations that silently discard mutations.

Tests updated: evidence_artifact_clone_isolates_fields,
scoring_result_clone_isolates_fields,
evidence_config_clone_isolates_fields,
evidence_error_clone_isolates_fields,
approval_signature_clone_isolates_fields,
milestone_evidence_integration_output_clone_isolates_fields

commit.message:
Add S3→Git sync and full pipeline scripts

New scripts:
- sync_s3_to_git.sh: Syncs S3 content to git repo
- full_pipeline.sh: Complete flow (fetch→analyze→S3→git→website)

Flow:
  Lambda/Local → S3 (MDX files)
  sync_s3_to_git.sh → Git commit
  Git push → GitHub Actions → Website rebuild

Usage:
  ./scripts/full_pipeline.sh        # Everything (updates website)
  ./scripts/full_pipeline.sh --dev  # Dev mode (no website update)
  ./scripts/sync_s3_to_git.sh       # Just sync S3 to git

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
docs: update CLAUDE.md to reflect new marketplace structure

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: Upgrade AGP to 9.1.0 with KMP restructuring (#3)

- Upgrade Android Gradle Plugin from 8.11.2 to 9.1.0
- Upgrade Gradle wrapper from 8.14.3 to 9.3.1
- Upgrade Compose Multiplatform from 1.10.0 to 1.10.2
- Create new :androidApp module (thin Android application shell)
- Convert :composeApp from com.android.application to com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library
- Convert :shared module to use new KMP library plugin
- Update module dependencies and build configuration for AGP 9 compatibility
- Update CLAUDE.md with new module structure and build commands

AGP 9 introduces breaking changes for KMP projects. The new
com.android.kotlin.multiplatform.library plugin replaces the standard
android.library plugin, and KMP + androidApplication cannot coexist in the
same module. The androidApp module now holds the Android entry point while
composeApp becomes a pure KMP Compose UI library.

All builds pass: androidApp:assembleDebug, server:build, test

Co-authored-by: SlavaLypchenko <viacheslav.lypchenko_external@zattoo.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add version labels to Docker image and use proper version tags

The Supervisor reads io.hass.version from Docker image labels to
determine the running HA Core version. Without this, it falls back
to the base image version (2025.10.1) which breaks updates.

via a subagent before finalizing. Broken links trigger a re-research
cycle — the main agent must find alternative sources or remove
unverifiable claims from the document.

commit.message:
fix: use actual Render API slug for service URLs instead of deterministic names

Render may append random suffixes to service names on paid tiers. Read
backend.service.slug and frontend.service.slug from the API response
(matching TwomiahBuild's approach) and set FRONTEND_URL via updateRenderEnvVars
after both services are created.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Homebrew CLI formula and fix ARM64 kernel decompression (#82)

- Add Homebrew formula for CLI binary alongside the existing cask
- Fix ARM64 kernel decompression: use gzip.GzipFile instead of
  gzip.decompress. The latter tries to read concatenated gzip members
  and fails on trailing non-gzip data in the EFI stub. GzipFile reads
  a single stream and stops correctly.

Co-authored-by: elyxlz <elyxlz@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: use bash -c pattern instead of curl pipe for install command

curl|bash reads the script incrementally from stdin, breaking
interactive prompts. bash -c "$(curl ...)" downloads the full
script first, keeping stdin connected to the terminal.

commit.message:
task-4.1: Class B EPT CoW + batched nft harness + phantom-fuzz

- Extend EPT CoW snapshot/restore to Class B (256MB kernel guest)
  - phantom_ept_lookup_pte_class_b() + phantom_ept_mark_all_ro_class_b()
  - Class B branches in ept_cow.c, snapshot.c, hypercall.c
- Batched netlink harness: multi-message sequences for nf_tables UAF patterns
  - Payload format: [u16 len][msg][u16 len][msg]...
  - KASAN unpoison for payload GPA region
- Seed generator outputs batched format (u16 length-prefixed messages)
- phantom-fuzz: standalone userspace fuzzer with nfnetlink dictionary,
  coverage-guided mutation, and crash deduplication
- docs/class-b-cow-plan.md: design document for Class B CoW feature

Tested: 80.8M iterations on COS 6.12.68 + KASAN, 22k exec/s, 0 false positives.

Smart device deletion: uninstall online agents before removing

When deleting a device that has an active WebSocket connection, the server
now sends an agent_uninstall command so the agent cleanly removes itself
(stops service, deletes files/config) before the DB record is deleted.
Offline devices are deleted immediately as before. The delete confirmation
modal now shows context-aware messages based on device status.

commit.message:
Fix critical offline bugs: queue status detection, API routes, IndexedDB persistence

CRITICAL fixes:
- api.js: Include _httpStatus in rejected errors so offlineQueue can detect 4xx
  (previously err.response.status was always undefined, blocking queue forever)
- Fix /auth/preferences -> /auth/profile in UserSettings + LanguageContext
  (route didn't exist on server, all settings saves were 404)
- Server: Add name_he/name_en handling to authController.updateProfile
- Server: Add 'flow' to valid gradient presets in userController

HIGH fixes:
- offlineQueue: suppressAuthRedirect reset now synchronous (was fire-and-forget)
- offlineQueue: Re-fetch ops after processing to catch newly enqueued items
- offlineQueue: Remap temp IDs in data payloads, not just URLs
- offlineQueue: Clean up ghost temp records from IndexedDB on 4xx rejection
- offlineQueue: Invalidate dataCache after sync so re-fetches get fresh data
- offlineQueue: Sort by id as tiebreaker for same-timestamp operations
- serviceService: addSongToService/removeSong/updateSong/updateTransposition
  now update IndexedDB optimistically (were queue-only, lost on reload)
- songService: Guard against null existing record in offline edit
- offlineStorage: Re-initialize DB connection after onversionchange close

MEDIUM fixes:
- AuthContext: Add concurrency guard for checkAuth (prevent racing parallel calls)
- AuthContext: Re-validate token on reconnect via 'online' event listener
- LanguageContext: Persist language to localStorage for all users (not just guests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: soluflow
repository.description: Worship service planning app with real-time sync

commit.message:
fix: comprehensive mobile platform support

Platform detection:
- detectPlatform() uses __platform__ constant (was hardcoded 'windows')
- Distinguishes iOS/iPadOS/Android with screen-based device classification
- Orientation change listener via perry_on_layout_change FFI
- Hardware keyboard detection is now platform-aware

Filesystem paths (iOS sandbox + Android):
- New centralized paths.ts module with getHomeDir/getTempDir/getAppDataDir
- iOS uses Documents dir via FFI, Android uses app-specific storage
- Replaced /bin/echo $HOME in settings.ts, sync-guest.ts, session-store.ts,
  chat-panel.ts
- Replaced hardcoded /tmp in render.ts, agent-tools.ts, agent-state.ts,
  lsp-bridge.ts
- canRunShellCommands() guard prevents shell execution on iOS/Android

Sync lifecycle:
- onAppBackground/onAppForeground hooks in sync-guest.ts
- Foreground reconnect skips backoff (immediate reconnect)
- Offline queue warns at 90/100, errors at 100/100 (was silent drop)
- generateMsgId() for relay-side deduplication

Layout fixes:
- Split layout (tablet) now includes 44px activity bar
- Right panel width: 300px on tablet (was 360px fixed)
- Terminal height: 25% of screen, capped 150-250px (was 200px fixed)
- Notifications width capped to screenWidth-40 on small screens
- Bottom toolbar buttons enforced at 44x44pt touch targets
- Compact layout bottom bar handlers wired (were no-ops)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
